default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content production priorities and process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**NGINX Pivot:** Content production is pivoting to NGINX. GrowthX will deliver 9 new articles by next Thursday to meet the 10-article goal for the Feb 24 GA launch.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [**Review Process Fix:** The content review process will be fixed to prevent missed edits. GrowthX will add a "Need Second Review" status in Airtable and use Google Docs' version history to highlight changes.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [**Performance Driver:** Organic traffic growth is directly tied to publishing frequency. The "Policy Enforcement" cluster's growth slowed from 350% to 52% after a publishing pause, proving the need for consistent output.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
  - [**Contract Urgency:** The contract renewal must be signed by the end of next week to avoid pausing work. Joel will escalate internally to ensure timely approval.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2152.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [**Problem:** Joel needs a more efficient way to review articles with unresolved comments.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
      - [He cannot easily see if edits were made, requiring him to re-read entire documents.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will implement two process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
      - [**Airtable Status:** Add a "Need Second Review" dropdown to trigger an alert for Joel.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [**Google Docs:** Use version history to highlight specific changes, making reviews faster.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)

### NGINX Content Pivot

  - [**Goal:** Publish 10 NGINX-related articles for the Feb 24 GA launch.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [**Rationale:** All NGINX content requires a formal internal approval process, which can take time.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [**Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Deliver 9 new articles by next Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
      - [**Joel:** Submit the 3 existing articles for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [**Buffer:** Aim for 12 total articles to mitigate risks from the approval process.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [**Content Direction:**](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [**Format:** Can be editorials or glossary-style pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [**Source:** Joel shared a "content Bible" with value props and competitor data (Amex, Wex, Brex, Ramp).](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
      - [**Angle:** Explore geo-specific content using the "100 zip codes" data, which identifies areas with high small business density.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)

### Performance & Strategy

  - [**Key Insight:** Publishing frequency directly drives organic traffic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
      - [**Example:** The "Policy Enforcement" cluster's growth slowed from 350% to 52% after a publishing pause.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
  - [**Top Performing Clusters (YoY Growth):**](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
      - [**Expense & Finance Management:** \~50% of all organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
      - [**Industry-Specific Content:** Strongest percentage growth (45%).](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
  - [**Recommendations:**](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1918.0)
      - [**Double Down:** Industry-specific content.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1918.0)
      - [**Maintain:** Practical travel resources.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1918.0)
      - [**Investigate:** Technology & software stagnation.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1918.0)
      - [**Consider:** Travel booking content (33% growth from a small base).](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1918.0)
  - [**Future Idea:** Refreshing old articles (e.g., "2025 credit cards" → "2026") could be an easy win and potentially count toward the NGINX article goal.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1947.0)

### Conversion Data & Analytics

  - [**Goal:** Track content's influence on conversions (signups, form submits).](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [**Method:** Use Amplitude's Google Sheets add-on for automated exports.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
      - [**Export:** Filter for "travel guides" URLs, broken down by day.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
      - [**Analysis:** Kyle will import the data into Looker Studio.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [**Attribution Model:** Joel wants to track both first-touch and multi-touch conversions to prove content's value, even if it's not the initial source.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [**Status:** Joel confirmed he can duplicate a similar analysis he built for customer stories.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)

### Contract Renewal

  - [**Urgency:** The contract renewal must be signed by the end of next week to avoid pausing work.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2152.0)
  - [**Context:** The pause would directly impact the NGINX launch timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2152.0)
  - [**Action:** Joel will escalate internally to ensure timely approval.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2193.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
      - [Add "Need Second Review" status to Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [Use Google Docs version history for future reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
      - [Deliver 9 new NGINX articles by next Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
      - [Investigate if existing articles can be refreshed for NGINX.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
  - [**Joel:**](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
      - [Submit 3 existing NGINX articles for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [Create and share the automated Amplitude conversion export.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
      - [Escalate the contract renewal internally to meet the deadline.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2193.0)
      - [Provide source materials for Direct Bill, Flex Pro 2, and Duty of Care.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
      - [Provide recommendations for the Organic Growth Lead role.](https://fathom.video/share/E6t6eUsQpZsyx-x8c3xtmW5Q9dAbdTDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
